title: MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING SERVICES AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: CENTER FOR ADDICTION AND COUNSELING SERVICES LLC MENTAL HEALTH COUNSELING SERVICES AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health assessments and counseling, as well as outpatient drug and alcohol treatment. Also offers services geared towards the LGBTQ+ community. 470 Lancaster Drive NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older Hours: Tuesday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 584-1906 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 584-1906 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Fee for service, accepts private insurance and Oregon Health Plan through Pacific Source DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion, and Polk, Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Thursday 9am-4pm, Tuesday/Wednesday Phone Sessions TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Directly behind Car Toys on Lancaster Drive Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Mental Health Evaluation Substance Use Disorder Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER FOR ADDICTION AND COUNSELING SERVICES LLC
